video.title: Superstar Climbers Clash In The Year's Final Monument | Il Lombardia 2023 Highlights

all_candidates.title: Superstar Climbers Clash In The Year's Final Monument | Il Lombardia 2023 Highlights
Thrilling Mini Il Lombardia! | Giro D'Italia 2023 Highlights - Stage 15

transcript.clean_text: Coro was the setting for the start of the Jodi lombardia the fifth and final Monument of the Season bringing the curtain down on 20123 on a bike the stars were in town a tremendous start list a goodbye to tibo Pino his last ever race as a professional with plenty of fans having made the journey from France to make sure they were there to cheer him on 238 km on the route seven climbs to take on a huge huge Undertaker 4,400 M of climbing and finishing in Bergamo where 2 years previous tacha had won V lombardia on his debut he won last year too and this time was aiming for a hattick but Evol was there as was roit and that is what they were taking on it was quite the start flag waves and a huge battle just to be in the Breakaway Thomas tent one of the early actors despite him animating things there were worries for rco evapo crashing just 21 km into the race there's a doubt as to whether he'd continue but he did he looked okay and his team were in the game 16 Riders would eventually get up the road and they take a maximum advantage of around 4 and a half minutes em Mass was the first big casualty with sudal quickstep starting to up their game Ben Healey made a move with Oscar on and with 70 kmers to go 40 seconds was the gap on the peltin with not too many riders left in the break marel luzi the last man standing after on also been dropped and Hy on his own with 40 km to go his problem was there was so much action to behind Adam Yates starting the party aapol distanced here and he would not see the front of the race again game RIT was with Yates Pacha there as well Simon Yates in the mix to and AOL helped by Ala Philip Alexander vlasov in the mix Woods would Chase on and in the end six or seven of the top bike riders in the planet were up there Olympic champion Richard kapaz Left Behind Pat are going over the top and starting to pull out a bit of a gap on the descent from selino he had 15 seconds as he went through the town and started taking on the 19 hairpins where he'd struggled two years before but he grew up to 45 seconds of a gap but with 12ks to go looked like he was starting to get cramp a drink and a ride back into the Rhythm meant that he he' approached the final climb with a minute that took him up onto the old town and the cobbled streets of bergam and then to the Finish straight where he could celebrate joining Legends Alfredo be the fter copy and now today poacha the only Riders to win three successive tours of Lombardi undefeated in this race in his three appearances now and only the third rider ever to win the J lombardia in the same year he won the Tour of Flanders the fight for the podium Was Won by bad joli he'd finished second RIT would end his relationship with yo visma his last ever race for the team in third but all the Delight all the joy all the glory to T Pacha beating by Jolie RIT vlasov Simon and Adam Yates with Rodriguez kapaz anapol and cron in the top 10 the Slovenian national anthem yet again played and t poacha ending the season in fine form the end of a special career and all the fans from France on the final race climb the kurva Pino with Tio Pino for One Last Time showing that there was plenty of heart despite there being no drama on the last day the 2023 Monument season is at an end a couple of stage races and a few one day events still to come but T Pacha took the final big prize
